title: dryopteris cycadina
intro: Dryopteris cycadina, also known as the fern-like cycad, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain, inflammation, and fever, as well as acting as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Dryopteris cycadina is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can be used in herbal teas, tinctures, or capsules, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
